400_bad_request.suggestion: Please check your request parameters and try again.

401_unauthorized.suggestion: Please provide a valid authentication token in the Authorization header.

403_forbidden.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.
403_forbidden.suggestion: Contact the administrator if you believe this is a mistake.

404_not_found.suggestion: The requested resource does not exist. Please verify the URL or ID.

405_method_not_allowed.message: HTTP method not allowed for this endpoint.
405_method_not_allowed.suggestion: Check the API documentation for allowed methods on this endpoint.

409_conflict.message: This email address is already registered.
409_conflict.suggestion: Try logging in instead, or use a different email address.

413_payload_too_large.message: Uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
413_payload_too_large.suggestion: Compress the file or upload a smaller version.

email: The email must be a valid email address.
password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
phone: The phone number must be a valid Bangladeshi number.

422_validation_failed.suggestion: Correct the highlighted fields and resubmit.

429_too_many_requests.message: Too many requests. Please try again in 60 seconds.
429_too_many_requests.suggestion: Slow down your request rate. Check the Retry-After header.

500_server_error.message: Internal server error. Please try again later.
500_server_error.suggestion: Our team has been notified. Please try again in a few minutes.

502_bad_gateway.message: Upstream server unavailable. Please try again later.
502_bad_gateway.suggestion: This is usually a temporary issue. Please refresh the page.

503_service_unavailable.message: Service is temporarily down for maintenance.
503_service_unavailable.suggestion: Please check back later. We apologize for the inconvenience.
